```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const xMin = -10, xMax = 10;
  const x0 = -b / w;
  const x0Clamped = Math.max(xMin, Math.min(x0, xMax));

  const xs = d3.range(xMin, xMax, 0.05);

  const curveData = xs.map(xi => ({ x: xi, y: activation(w * xi + b) }));
  const axisData  = xs.map(xi => ({ x: xi, pred: activation(w * xi + b) >= 0.5 ? 1 : 0 }));

  // class 1 → #bae4b3 (green), class 0 → #9ecae1 (blue)
  const c1 = "rgba(186, 228, 179, 0.2)";
  const c0 = "rgba(158, 202, 225, 0.2)";
  const leftColor  = activation(w * xMin + b) >= 0.5 ? c1 : c0;
  const rightColor = activation(w * xMax + b) >= 0.5 ? c1 : c0;

  const plot = Plot.plot({
    width: 640,
    height: 380,
    x: { label: "x",          domain: [xMin, xMax]   },
    y: { label: "σ(wx + b)",  domain: [-0.05, 1.05]  },
    style: { background: "white" },
    marks: [
      Plot.rect([{}], { x1: xMin,      x2: x0Clamped, y1: 0, y2: 1, fill: leftColor  }),
      Plot.rect([{}], { x1: x0Clamped, x2: xMax,      y1: 0, y2: 1, fill: rightColor }),
      Plot.line(curveData, { x: "x", y: "y", stroke: "black", strokeWidth: 3 }),
      Plot.ruleX([x0], { stroke: "black", strokeDasharray: "4,4" }),
      Plot.dot([{ x: x0 }], { x: "x", y: 0.5, fill: "black", r: 5 }),
      Plot.dot(axisData, {
        x: "x", y: 0,
        fill: d => d.pred === 1 ? "#bae4b3" : "#9ecae1",
        r: 2.5
      })
    ]
  });

  const title = document.createElement("div");
  title.textContent = `Decision boundary at x₀ = ${x0.toFixed(2)}`;
  title.style.cssText = "text-align: center; font-size: 0.9em; margin-bottom: 2px;";

  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.style.cssText = "display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;";
  div.appendChild(title);
  div.appendChild(plot);
  return div;
}
```
